shared.product_names_seller: Product names are shown as listed by the seller.
shared.javascript_required: JavaScript is required for language switching, filtering and sorting. Essential marketplace links remain available.
shared.affiliate_disclosure: Affiliate disclosure: Digital Ecosphere may earn a commission from qualifying purchases through links on this page, at no additional cost to you. Confirm current prices, availability and delivery terms on the retailer’s website.
shared.no_translation: English fallback is being shown because this translation could not be loaded.
shared.site_tagline: Connecting nature, technology, and society through research and digital knowledge.
shared.country_intro: Explore selected practical products for shoppers in {country}. Prices were listed in {currency}; current price, stock, tax and delivery are confirmed on AliExpress.
shared.prices_change: Prices, availability, ratings and delivery conditions may change. Please confirm the current information on the seller’s website before purchasing.
shared.no_match: No items matched your search and filter.
shared.browse_available_intro: Search and filter the available products, collections, showcases or offers.
shared.explore_platform: Explore selected {brand} products, collections and current offers for shoppers in {country}.
shared.app_open_note: For the best app handoff, tap a marketplace link directly. If the app does not open, the same link continues in your browser.
shared.official_profile_help: Open the official TikTok profile, then tap the shopping-bag or Showcase icon in the TikTok app.
shared.showcase_help: Open the current TikTok Shop showcases and review product details directly in TikTok.
shared.current_campaigns_help: Open the current campaign or storefront and confirm eligibility, coupons and delivery terms on Temu.
shared.shein_collection_help: Open the live SHEIN collection to browse current fashion, beauty, accessories, home, gadgets, gifts and trending picks.
shared.shein_referral_help: In the SHEIN app, search the referral code {code} to find the selected collection.
shared.amazon_collection_help: Browse selected Amazon Japan recommendations across fashion, technology, cameras, creator tools, research, travel and practical products.
shared.amazon_card_help: Open Amazon.co.jp to see the current seller, price, specifications, availability, delivery and return conditions.
shared.selection_method_text: Selections combine recognizable brands, practical usefulness and Digital Ecosphere themes. Always verify the seller, authenticity, compatibility, price, delivery and returns on the retailer website.
shared.full_affiliate_disclosure: Some links are affiliate or promotional links. Digital Ecosphere may receive a commission or referral benefit from an eligible purchase or action, without increasing the visitor’s price. Prices, stock, delivery, returns, campaign terms and eligibility are controlled by the retailer and may change.
shared.step_review: Review current products, prices and conditions on the retailer platform.
shared.step_order: Complete payment and delivery arrangements directly with the retailer.
shared.seller_names: Product names are shown as listed by the seller.
